---
id: update-custom-access-link
title: "Update a custom access link"
description: "Updates the name, expiry, or access code of an existing custom access link."
sidebar_label: "Update a custom access link"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update a custom access link"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/installable-artifacts/{installable_artifact_id}/custom-access-links/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates the name, expiry, or access code of an existing custom access link.
